## PR Type

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: code change without behavior change
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] test: adds/updates tests
- [ ] chore: maintenance tasks

## Summary

- What does this PR do?
- Why is this PR needed?

## Motivation

- Problem being solved
- User value or technical need

## Solution

- How is the problem solved?
- Key implementation details or design decisions

## Testing

- Commands run:
  - `make test`
  - `go test ./...`
  - `go test ./... -run TestFoo`
- Any specific test scenarios verified

## Checklist

- [ ] CI is passing
- [ ] Code is formatted (`go fmt ./...`)
- [ ] Linter checks are passing (`golangci-lint run ./...`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated as needed
- [ ] Docs/README/CONTRIBUTING updated (if needed)

## Risk and impact

- Are there any backward compatibility concerns?
- Does this change affect production behavior or existing users?

## Notes

- Additional context and follow-up tasks
